## Overview

`defenseclaw version` — Show DefenseClaw CLI / gateway / plugin versions and flag drift.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_py:version -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
defenseclaw version [OPTIONS]
```

### Description

Show DefenseClaw CLI / gateway / plugin versions and flag drift

Show DefenseClaw CLI / gateway / plugin versions and flag drift.

    This is the command to run first when a bug report says "the
    guardrail isn't blocking" — nine times out of ten the problem is a
    freshly rebuilt CLI talking to a stale gateway binary still living
    in the operator's PATH from ``make install`` weeks ago.

### Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Env var | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `--json` | boolean | — | — | no | Emit a machine-readable report. |
| `--no-drift-exit` | boolean | — | — | no | Always exit 0, even if component versions disagree (useful in CI). |

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_py:version -->

## Usage

### Print version metadata

```bash
defenseclaw version
defenseclaw version --json
```

Use JSON output for automation.

### Avoid drift exit codes

```bash
defenseclaw version --no-drift-exit
```

This is useful in diagnostics where you want the version report even when local components differ.
